mechanism: Permanent central bank balance sheet expansion drives non-G3 central banks to diversify reserves into gold as a hedge against fiat currency debasement. The sanctions-driven acceleration (post-Russian reserve freeze) compounds the structural trend. Gold functions as a pressure release valve for permanent expansion.
regime_dependence: Post-2022 regime following Russian reserve freeze. Dependent on continued sanctions environment and non-G3 central bank diversification mandates. Price elasticity of official demand at $3,000+ is unknown.
